calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-28-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-03-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

William M. Duncan, Esq. Esq. appeared for plaintiff Textainer Equipment Management Limited.
Richard Murphy, Vice President for Textainer Equipment Management Limited, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Jin Yang Shipping Co., Ltd., a corporation under the laws of South Korea.
Default was entered against defendant on February 23, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on March 8, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Textainer Equipment Management Limited, and against the Defaulted Defendant Jin Yang Shipping Co., Ltd., a corporation under the laws of South Korea, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $141,187.23.
Attorney Fees - $12,957.54.
Total - $154,144.77.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
